CERTIFICATION IN RELATION TO THE TAX COMPLIANCE PROVISION
By signing on this form, I certify that
The answer below is true and accurate, and I agree to notify Manulife within 30 days if there is any
change in any of the information which I have provided.
1. US Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act
Are you a United States person, being a U.S. citizen, U.S. resident for U.S. federal income tax purposes
or U.S. Resident Alien (i.e. a so-called U.S. Green Card holder)?
 Yes 是 (Please provide your consent to report and U.S. TIN. by submitting the prescribed
form/substitute Form W-9 as requested by Manulife. Please also complete your U.S.
jurisdiction of tax residency and TIN in Part 2.
 No
Important Notes
- You must answer “Yes” if you are a U.S. citizen even though you reside outside of the U.S.
- You must answer “Yes” if you hold multiple citizenships, one of which is U.S. citizenship.
- You must answer “Yes” if you were born in the U.S. (or U.S. Territory) and have not legally surrendered U.S. citizenship.
- You may be considered a U.S. resident for U.S. federal income tax purposes (and therefore, must answer “Yes”) if you meet
the “Substantial Physical Presence Test”. You will meet this test if, for instance, during the current year, you were present in
the U.S. for at least 183 days under a specified formula. For more details, please refer to the information on the IRS’ website
http://www.irs.gov/Individuals/International-Taxpayers/Substantial-Presence-Test.
- You must answer “Yes” if the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Service (USCIS) has issued you a U.S. alien registration card
as a lawful permanent resident of the United States.
- You must answer “Yes” irrespective of your Green Card’s expiration date and irrespective of whether such expiration date has
passed as of the date you sign and complete this form.
- You should answer “No” if your Green Card has been officially abandoned, revoked, or relinquished as of the date you sign
and complete this form and you are not a US citizen or a U.S. resident for U.S. federal income tax purposes for any other
reason.
- The above certification is mandatory for enrolment on or after July 1, 2014.
（http://www.irs.gov/Individuals/International-Taxpayers/Substantial-Presence-Test）。

收集個人資料聲明
為遵從《個人資料（私隱）條例》（第 486 章）（簡稱《私隱條例》）的通知規定，保險業監管局（「保監局」）制定本《收集個人資料聲明》。本聲明
載述保監局有關你個人資料（定義見《私隱條例》）的政策及常規、保監局收集和使用你個人資料的目的，以及可獲轉移你個人資料的人士，謹請
細閱。
收集目的
保監局可就下列其中一個或多個目的，使用並持有你或任何其他人士於本申請中所提供（及補充證明）的個人資料：
(a) 實施及／或執行保監局依據其獲賦予的權力所制定或頒布且於相關時間生效的任何相關條例 （包括《保險業條例》（第 41 章）
（簡稱《條例》））及任何規例、規則、守則、指引及通函的規定，以及履行其作為保險業監管機構的職能，包括：
(i) 依據《條例》處理你可能向保監局提出或保監局所接獲的任何申請；
(ii) 依據《條例》評核你有關申請牌照或獲批准（視所屬情況而定）的適當人選資格；
(iii) 依據《條例》監察你是否繼續持牌或獲批准（視所屬情況而定）的適當人選；
(iv) 依據《條例》考慮你可能在其他方面與之有關的任何申請；
(v) 依據《條例》於所備存的公眾登記冊中展示和發布個人資料（如適用）；
(vi) 調查投訴和處理查詢；
(vii) 展開法律訴訟、查察、調查，以及採取執法行動或紀律處分；
(b) 在任何適當的時候，以及在香港法律允許的範圍內，配合並協助香港或香港以外任何地方的任何其他監管機構及／或執法機構；
(c) 統計和研究；及／或
(d) 香港法律允許的任何其他目的。
你須按保監局的要求提供所需的個人資料，以便保監局行使其權力或履行其職能（包括處理你的申請）。若未能提供所需的個人資料，則可能導致
保監局無法行使其權力或履行其職能（包括處理你的申請），並可能影響保監局依據《條例》評核你的適當人選資格。
轉移／核對個人資料
保監局根據相關法律及規例履行職能時，可就上述目的將所持你的個人資料披露或轉移予任何第三方，包括香港的金融監管機構 包括但不限於強制
性公積金計劃管理局、證券及期貨事務監察委員會及香港金融管理局）、香港或香港以外的教育機構／考試機構（以便進行資格考核或核實學術／
專業資格）、相關委任主事人 （獲授權保險人、持牌保險代理機構及／或持牌保險經紀公司（視所屬情況而定））、旅行代理商註冊處、香港旅遊業
議會、執法機構、法庭、審裁處及委員會，及／或（在香港法律容許及／或有所規定的情況下）依據保監局與（香港或香港以外的）監管機構或監
管／政府／司法部門之間的任何監管／監督／調查協助安排，披露或轉移予該等機構／部門或獲保監局委聘協助其履行職能的人士。
保監局亦可就對有關資料進行比較、核實及／或核對程序1的目的使用個人資料及／或將個人資料披露或轉移予上述各方。
公眾登記冊
保監局須依據《條例》或任何相關附屬法例備存公眾登記冊，當中載有與持牌保險中介人有關的指定資料。任何公眾人士均可免費查閱公眾登記
冊，以確定與其處事的人士就任何受規管活動而言是否持牌保險中介人或獲持牌保險代理機構／保險經紀公司認可的負責人員，以及確定有關人士
獲發牌照成為持牌保險中介人及／或獲核准成為負責人員的詳情。
查閱資料
根據《私隱條例》，你有權要求查閱及／或更正保監局所持你的個人資料。請填寫「查閱資料要求表格」（可於保監局網站查閱），並以郵遞方式寄
送至保監局的個人資料私隱主任（地址為香港黃竹坑香葉道41號19樓），以便處理你的要求。保監局有權就處理任何有關要求收取合理的費用。
查詢
任何有關保監局收集、使用或轉移個人資料的查詢，或有關查閱及／或更正保監局所持你個人資料的要求，應以書面形式向以下人士提出：
個人資料私隱主任
保險業監管局
香港黃竹坑香葉道 41 號 19 樓
保監局的私隱政策可於保監局的網站查閱。
1 「核對程序 」的定義見《私隱條例》第 2 條。

We, on behalf of the above-said company, hereby confirm and declare吾等謹代表上述公司確認及聲明:
1. We understand Manulife will only handle the asset transfer/termination processing from our original provider for those members listed on the attached member list. Likewise, we are obliged to clarify the employment status of members
who are not on the list, and liaise with the original provider for their respective enrollment / asset transfer / termination processes.
吾等明白，宏利只為已附上的成員名單而處理原計劃的資產轉移/終止程序。吾等作為僱主，有責任澄清成員的僱傭身份，並就成員登記/資產轉移/終止程序與原供應商進行聯絡。
2. The above transfer will have no detrimental effect on the accrued benefit of the employees. We hereby certify that we have duly communicated the changes of governing rules of the MPF Sub-scheme to the employees concerned. We
declare that, to the best of our knowledge and belief, all information provided in the Employer Application Form regarding the scheme transfer is correct, complete and true. Manulife should not be liable for any breaches due to non
disclosure of pertinent facts/information. We undertake to indemnify Manulife on a full indemnity basis for any damages, losses or expenses suffered or incurred by Manulife by reason of or in any way occasioned by the said
confirmation.
以上轉移將不會對僱員的累算權益構成損害。本公司茲證明本公司已通知受影響僱員有關更改強積金附屬計劃管限規則之事宜。就吾等所知及所信,僱主申請表格中就計劃轉移所提供的一切資料均屬正確、完整及真實。
宏利並不因未披露相關事實/資料而構成任何違反。吾等同意以上聲明乃按上述提供的聲明及證據而作出。對於宏利因所述確認或其引起之任何理由而蒙受或招致的損害、損失或開支，吾等保證向宏利作出全面的賠償。
3. To provide or authorize Manulife (International) Limited to obtain members’ “Date of joining scheme” record from my previous MPF Exempted ORSO Scheme trustee / administrator for the purpose of MMB preservation. Otherwise, all
members enrolled to the MPF Exempted ORSO Scheme will be deemed as NEW members.

t: 僱主作出強積金供款 及繳交附加費的責任
s:
僱主作出強積金供款 及繳交附加費的責任
僱主須依法在供款日或之前為僱員作出供款，並把填妥的付款結算書送達受託人。
有關飲食業及建造業的臨時僱員之供款安排，請參閱積金局網頁(www.mpfa.org.hk) 備有的「強積
金行業計劃」單張。
僱主如未能準時作出供款（不論遲交或供款金額不足），須依法支付相等於欠款款額 5% 的附加
費。附加費會全數存入受影響僱員的強積金帳戶。
提出反對須知
提出反對的資格
你提出的反對會如何處理？
你必須符合以下資格，才能提出反對：
 已準時為每名僱員向受託人作出全數供款及提交資 僱主
text:
僱主作出強積金供款 及繳交附加費的責任
僱主須依法在供款日或之前為僱員作出供款，並把填妥的付款結算書送達受託人。
有關飲食業及建造業的臨時僱員之供款安排，請參閱積金局網頁(www.mpfa.org.hk) 備有的「強積
金行業計劃」單張。
僱主如未能準時作出供款（不論遲交或供款金額不足），須依法支付相等於欠款款額 5% 的附加
費。附加費會全數存入受影響僱員的強積金帳戶。
提出反對須知
提出反對的資格
你提出的反對會如何處理？
你必須符合以下資格，才能提出反對：
 已準時為每名僱員向受託人作出全數供款及提交資 僱主與受託人核實
料準確齊備的付款結算書；及/或 繳款情況及供款資料
 無須為相關僱員作出供款。
僱主在附加費通知書
如何提出反對？ 發出日期起計
14 日內
 先與受託人核實繳款情況及供款資料 向積金局提交表格及證明文件
 填寫本「反對附加費表格」（表格）
 提交本表格及所有證明文件給積金局： 積金局向僱主發出確認書及
有需要時聯絡僱主索取
傳真： 2259 8338 補充資料
地址： 香港九龍觀塘觀塘道 388 號
創紀之城 1 期 1 座 25 樓
積金局轉交個案
積金局不會接收郵資不足的郵件，有關郵件將由香港 予受託人調查
郵政退回寄件人或予以銷毀。請支付足額郵資。
何謂有效的反對？ 受託人調查個案後
向積金局提交資料
僱主提出的反對，必須符合以下所有準則，才會視為有效：
 表格已在「強積金欠款及附加費繳款通知書」（附加 積金局覆核個案及
費通知書）發出日期起計 14 日內以傳真、郵遞方式 通知僱主結果
或親身遞交積金局。逾期提出反對將不獲受理。
 已填妥表格內所有適用的欄目。資料不全的表格將
不獲受理。 查詢
 已就所有僱員及供款期提交相關的證明文件，證明 請聯絡有關受託人或致電積金局熱線：
僱主已準時向受託人作出全數供款，或無須作出供 2918 0102
款。
收集個人資料聲明
 在本表格提供的個人資料及證明文件將用於處理你就附加費所提出的反對。
 你所提供的資料只會因應上述用途或在法律允許的情況下使用、披露或轉移。
 如未能提供所需的個人資料，以致積金局無法檢索你公司的紀錄，或無法聯絡你公司、有關受
託人及其他有關人士或機構，積金局可能無法處理你提出的反對。
 如欲查閱及／或更正你備存於積金局的個人資料，可致函積金局個人資料私隱主任，提出有關
要求。
罪行及罰則
僱主如未能準時作出供款，即屬違法。積金局可向僱主展開民事及/或刑事法律程序。僱主如被檢
控，一經定罪，最高罰則如下：
罪行 最高罰則
沒有從僱員的有關入息扣除 5% 罰款$350,000 及監禁 3 年
沒有向受託人支付強制性供款
已從僱員的有關入息扣除 5% 罰款$450,000 及監禁 4 年
積金局亦有權向僱主施加罰款，款額為$5,000 或拖欠款額的 10%，以較高者為準。

This is to confirm that the following members under the captioned group policy are no longer
working at ___________________________________ (Name of Existing Employer) “the
Previou
text:
To : Manulife (International) Ltd.
From :
Date :
Re: Group Policy No. _________
This is to confirm that the following members under the captioned group policy are no longer
working at ___________________________________ (Name of Existing Employer) “the
Previous Company” and will be transferred to _________________________________ (Name of
New Employer) “the New Company” with effect from ______________ (DD/MM/YYYY).
We hereby apply for the replacement of the captioned group policy by a new group policy to be
issued to the New Company “the New Policy” to continue the same policy coverage in respect of
the following members. It is understood that the captioned group policy of the Previous
Company will upon completion of this replacement process be terminated.
We hereby apply for the transfer of any unused premium paid by the Previous Company under
the captioned group policy to the New Policy and we understand that any waiver of underwriting
requirements for the above replacement and in particular for the said members to be enrolled in
the New Policy will be conditional upon the fact that all these members are the same and their
employment are transferred from the Previous Company to the New Company with same or
similar job duties.
Member List
Member Name Employment Date with the New Company
It is understood and agreed that all claims paid under the captioned group policy of the Previous
Company in respect of the above members shall be treated as paid claims in respect of the same
members under the New Policy for the purpose of determining the maximum benefit that the said
members are entitled under the Benefit Schedule of the New Policy.
Yours sincerely,
__________________________________ _________________________________
(Signed by Authorized person of Existing (Signed by Authorized person of New
Employer with company stamp) Employer with company stamp)
(Version 06/2016)

s:
LETTER OF REQUEST AND INDEMNITY
(Early Release of Medical Cards / Panel Service)
To: Manulife (International) Limited (“Manulife”)
Policy No. : (the “Policy”)
Policyholder Name :
I understand and acknowledge that Manulife will not release the medical cards or
text:
LETTER OF REQUEST AND INDEMNITY
(Early Release of Medical Cards / Panel Service)
To: Manulife (International) Limited (“Manulife”)
Policy No. : (the “Policy”)
Policyholder Name :
I understand and acknowledge that Manulife will not release the medical cards or
renew the panel service (as the case may be) to the above Policyholder and its insured
members unless and until payment of the premium required to effect the Policy or
renewal of the Policy (as the case may be) has been made (the “Standard Procedure”).
Notwithstanding the Standard Procedure, I hereby request that Manulife releases the
medical cards or renew the panel service (as the case may be) to the Policyholder and
its insured members before payment of the aforesaid premium is made (the
"Request"). In consideration of Manulife complying with my Request, I agree to
indemnify Manulife and hold Manulife harmless against all loss and expenses and
damages suffered or incurred by Manulife as a direct or indirect result of Manulife
complying with the Request.
Please arrange to send the medical cards (if any) to me for distributing to the
Policyholder / its insured members; or
Please arrange to deliver the medical cards (if any) to the Policyholder
directly.
(In the absence of ✔ in any box above, the medical cards shall be
delivered to the agent for distributing to the Policyholder / its insured members)
For renewal Policy, I understand that the above requested medical cards / panel
service will only be released in around 4 working days upon receipt by Manulife of
this Letter of Request and Indemnity and all required documents (i.e. renewal
confirmation / signed proposal) and the completion of the benefit changes (if any). As
such, please be confirmed that this undertaking has been submitted together with the
renewal confirmation / signed proposal to Manulife for processing.

text:
3. 資料更改之具報
• 個人帳戶持有人登入保險中介一站通後，可點擊「資料更改之具報」以開始更改資
料的程序。
• 剔選需要更改之資料，並輸入新資料及生效日期。
10
• 如更改姓名，請提供新的身份證明文件副本（如香港身份證）及改名契副本，以支
持此項更改。
• 個人持牌人確認所有資料為真實及準確後，可點擊「提交」的按鈕，遞交予保監局
處理。
• 一次性密碼會以短訊形式傳送到個人持牌人已登記的手機電話號碼，他/她須在五
分鐘內輸入該一次性密碼。假如帳戶持有人未能接收該一次性密碼，他/她可點擊
「重新發送」按鈕，以取得一個新的一次性密碼。
• 一般來說，如具報於中午十二時前提交，而更改的項目不需要附加證明文件，有關
紀錄將於一日後更新。
• 請注意，當有其他資料具報已遞交至保監局而仍在處理中時，「資料更改之具報」
功能會暫時不能被使用。

text:
收集個人資料收集聲明
（委任／受委人之申請者）
定義
1. 本收集個人資料收集聲明（「聲明」）中使用的「查閱資料要求」，「改正資料要求」，「資料當事人」，「資料使用者」，
「核對程序」及「個人資料」，具有《條例》中規定的含義。
就本聲明而言：
「委任」指任命個別人士而其所提供的服務乃通過與宏利達成以下協議委任該個別人士而獲得：(i)就宏利人壽保險（國
際）有限公司而言，該公司的標準Career Agent’s Agreement 及／或 Agency Management Agreement 及／或 Career
Pensioner’s Agreement 及／或 Personal Production Agreement 及 (ii) 就宏利投資管理（香港）有限公司而言，該公司
的標準Agent Agreement， 而「受委任的」及「受委人」亦應據此作解釋。
「香港」指香港特別行政區。
「申請者」指一項委任之個別申請人。
「宏利」指就各自申請者及／或受委人而言的宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司或宏利投資管理（香港）有限公司（視情況
而定）。
「宏利集團」指宏利金融有限公司及其子公司和關聯公司。
「條例」指《個人資料（私隱）條例》。
收集
2. 申請者需要向宏利提供與其申請相關的個人資料。如未能提供該等資料可能導致宏利無法處理其申請。
3. 宏利在委任過程中會從受委人處收集或獲得個人資料，及／或就受委人而言收集或獲得其個人資料。
目的
4. 申請者或受委人（視情況而定）的個人資料使用目的可包括以下各項：-
(a) 評估申請者擔當所申請職位之職務的適合性及／或評估受委人對其不時同意或合資格擔當任何職位之職務（由宏利
集團任何成員或宏利集團外的任何公司或實體，包括但不限於經營—般保險業務的保險人提供或給予）的適合性；
(b) 釐定將與申請者商討的補償、花紅及福利 （若通過甄選）；
(c) 與獲選申請者商討委任及向其提出委任；
(d) 向受委人提供補償及福利；
(e) 監督及管理受委人；
(f) 發展及維持宏利與受委人之間的委任關係，以及支持宏利及任何宏利集團成員的發展；
(g) 以助進行工作表現評估、發展安排及委任發展之有關活動；
(h) 監察宏利不時發佈的內部守則及指引之合規情況；
(i) 檢討委任決定；
(j) 在受委人缺席辦公室時聯絡該受委人；
(k) 評估受委人的培訓及發展需要；
(l) 管理受委人作出供款及／或從中受益的退休及／或公積金計劃；
(m) 與前受委人之委任相關剩餘活動，包括（但不限於）提供任職證明，處理再委任的相關申請以及退休及／或公積金
計劃給付的相關事宜；以及讓宏利履行其合約或法定責任；
(n) 確認以及分辨申請者及／或受委人（視情況而定）的個別身份；
(o) 確認從申請者及／或受委人（視情況而定）收集所得資料的準確性；
(p) 就受委人所作、所遭受或以其他方式涉及的與其受委任有關的任何索償而言，與此等索償有關的目的，包括（但不
限於）提出此等索償、就此等索償抗辯、分析、調查、處理、評估、作出決定或回應；
(q) 進行與人才任命相關的任何職能或活動，包括（但不限於）資料調查及分析；
(r) 開展核對程序（定義見《條例》，但廣義包括對資料當事人兩套或更多套的資料進行比對，以採取不利於資料當事
人的行動，例如拒絕申請）；
(s) 根據對宏利或宏利集團任何成員（無論在香港境內還是境外）有約束力或對其適用的任何法律、法規、規章、守則、
指引或指南的規定進行披露，包括但不限於向當地或外國的監管機構、政府機構、法院、執法機構、或其他機構、
公認行業組織、信貸資料服務機構或審計機構（無論在香港境內還是境外）進行披露；
(t) 由於宏利或宏利集團任何成員在相關當地或外國監管機構、政府機構、公認行業組織、信貸資料服務機構或審計
(06/2024)
機構所在司法管轄區的或涉及該等司法管轄區的財務、商業、業務或其他利益或活動而由宏利或宏利集團任何成
員承擔或施加給其的、與該等當地或外國監管機構、政府機構、或公認行業組織、信貸資料服務機構或審計機構（
無論在香港境內還是境外）之間的任何合同、其他承諾或安排；
(u) 用於經營目的、信貸評估、信貸評分模型或統計分析（每項均包括行為分析以及對與宏利集團之間總體關係的評
估，其中包括為遵守關於在宏利集團內部共用資料和資訊的任何義務、要求、政策、程序、措施或安排而使用該等
資料，及／或根據宏利集團內任何有關遵守制裁或防止或偵測洗錢、為恐怖份子提供資金或其他非法活動的計劃
而對資料和資訊進行的其他使用），無論是針對資料當事人還是其他人的；
(v) 行使宏利在委任受委人方面可能享有的任何權利；
(w) 進行身份及／或信貸核查；
(x) 確定應向受委人支付或受委人應付的任何債務金額，向受委人或向為受委人債務提供任何擔保或承諾的任何人收
取和追討任何應收金額；
(y) 使宏利或宏利集團任何成員的權利或業務的實際或擬議受讓人、承讓人、參與人或次級參與人能對該等受讓、承
讓、參與或次級參與擬涉及的交易進行評估；
(z) 向受委人委派的任何特定工作中具體規定的目的；
(aa) 與上述相關的任何目的（包括尋求專業意見），或宏利或宏利集團任何成員的一般政策下有關人才管理的任何其
他目的 （於宏利或宏利集團成員不時向受委人提供的通知、通告或其他條款和條件中訂明）。
承轉人
5. 宏利持有的申請者及／或受委人（視情況而定）個人資料將予以保密，但宏利可就上文第4條所載的任何目的將該等資
料移轉給下列人士及／或實體（無論在香港境內還是境外）：-
(a) 與申請者、針對申請者或涉及申請者及／或受委人（視情況而定）就任何申請或委任事宜提出的任何索賠相關的任
何人士；
(b) 向宏利或宏利集團任何成員提供與業務經營相關的行政管理、電信通訊、電腦、資訊技術、付款、資料處理或儲
存、市場推廣、郵寄、列印、電話行銷、客戶滿意度分析或其他服務的任何代理、承辦商或第三方服務供應商，包括
任何託管人，執行人，投資管理人，投資顧問或分銷商；
(c) 任何信貸資料服務機構或（如出現付款違約）任何債務托收機構；
(d) 任何宏利客戶（包括準客戶）；
(e) 任何宏利受委人（包括受委人的僱員）；
(f) 保險商、再保險商及醫療服務供應商；
(g) 任何宏利或宏利集團成員的員工；
(h) 已向宏利或宏利集團任何成員承諾將對該等資料保密的任何人士；
(i) 宏利或宏利集團的權利或業務的任何實際或擬議受讓人、承讓人、參與人或次級參與人；
(j) 宏利集團的任何成員；
(k) 宏利或宏利集團任何成員根據對其有約束力或適用的任何法律、法規、規章、守則、指引或指南的規定有義務或必
須向其披露的任何人士，其中包括但不限於任何當地或外國的監管機構、政府機構或公認行業組織、信貸資料服
務機構或審計機構；
(l) 根據由於宏利或宏利集團任何成員在相關當地或外國監管機構、政府機構、公認行業組織、信貸資料服務機構或
審計機構所在司法管轄區的或涉及該等司法管轄區的財務、商業、業務或其他利益或活動而由宏利或宏利集團任
何成員承擔或施加給其的、與該等當地或外國監管機構、政府機構、法院、執法機構、或其他機構、公認行業組織、
信貸資料服務機構或審計機構（無論在香港境內還是境外）之間的任何合同、其他承諾或安排，有義務或必須向其
披露的任何人士。
6. 根據《條例》，資料當事人有權：-
(a) 要求查閱其個人資料；
(b) 要求對其任何不準確的個人資料進行改正；
(c) 査明資料使用者在個人資料方面的政策和慣例；
(d) 了解資料使用者持有的個人資料類型；
(e) 了解資料使用者持有的個人資料的主要目的或主要擬議目的；
(f) 通過下文第7條所載的渠道提出查閱資料要求和改正資料要求。
7. 根據《條例》規定，宏利有權就處理任何查閱資料要求收取合理費用。要求可以書面形式提交給經銷獎酬部主任：
宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司
香港九龍觀塘偉業街223-231號宏利金融中心A座22樓
宏利投資管理（香港）有限公司
香港九龍觀塘海濱道83號宏利大樓23樓
(06/2024)
8. 本聲明的任何部分均不得產生或被詮釋為 (a) 宏利及／或宏利集團任何成員與 (b) 申請者及／或受委人（視情況而定）
之間產生僱傭關係（無論是否 (i) 明示或暗示，或 (ii) 之間存續或現在或將來的）。
更新及變更
9. 宏利保留可隨時並在無須事先通知的情況下增添，修改，更新或修訂本聲明的權利，並僅會知會申請者或受委人（視情
況而定）有關增補，修改，更新或修訂。倘宏利決定修改此聲明（或其相等文件），宏利將於透過宏利的通訊渠道或以書
面形式知會申請者或受委人有關更改，以便申請者或受委人知悉宏利所收集的資料，該資料如何使用及在何種情況下
會披露該資料。任何有關修改，更新或修訂將在通知後或宏利另行指定時即時生效。
10. 重要提示：對於位於中華人民共和國境內（為本聲明目的，不包括香港，澳門及台灣）的申請者或受委人（視情況而定）
，特定的《有關<中華人民共和國個人信息保護法>的私隱附錄(為內地居民設定)》(「私隱附錄」) 將為適用。此私隱附錄
可在宏利的網站上獲取和查閱。
11. 為確保所有申請者或受委人充分了解關於宏利的個人信息處理的做法和標準，本聲明提供多種語言版本。若翻譯版本
之間有任何歧義，將以英文版本為準。
(06/2024)
Personal Information Collection Statement
(Applicants for Appointment / Appointees)
DEFINITIONS
1. “Data access request”, “data correction request”, “data subject”, “data user”, “matching procedures”
and “personal data” used throughout this Personal Information Collection Statement (“Statement”) shall have the
meaning as defined in the Ordinance.
For the purpose of this Statement:
“appointment” shall mean the engagement of an individual whose service is procured through (i) in the case of
Manulife (International) Limited, its standard form Career Agent’s Agreement and/or Agency Management Agreement
and/or Career Pensioner’s Agreement and/or Personal Production Agreement and (ii) in the case of Manulife Investment
Management (Hong Kong) Limited, its standard form Agent Agreement, with Manulife which appoints such individual,
and the terms “appoint”, “appointed”, and “appointee” shall be construed accordingly.
“Hong Kong” shall mean the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region.
“applicant” shall mean an individual applying for an appointment.
“Manulife” shall mean Manulife (International) Limited, or Manulife Investment Management (Hong Kong) Limited (as
the case may be) in respect of its respective applicants and/or appointees.
“Manulife Group” shall mean Manulife Financial Corporation and its subsidiaries and affiliates.
“Ordinance” shall mean Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance.
COLLECTION
2. It is necessary for applicants to supply Manulife with personal data in connection with their applications. Failure to
supply such data may result in Manulife being unable to process their applications.
3. It is also the case that personal data are collected or received by Manulife from and/or in respect of appointees
throughout the course of their appointment.
PURPOSES
4. The purposes for which personal data of an applicant or appointee (as the case may be) may be used include the
following: -
(a) assessing the applicant’s suitability to assume the duties of the position for which the applicant has applied and/
or assessing the appointee’s suitability to assume the duties of any position (offered or provided by any member of
Manulife Group, or any company or entity outside Manulife Group, including without limitation, insurer carrying on
general insurance business) for which the appointee agrees to or is qualified to assume from time to time;
(b) determining preliminary compensation, bonus payment, and benefit package to be discussed with the applicant
subject to selection for the position;
(c) negotiating with and making offers of appointment to selected applicant;
(d) provision of compensation and benefits for appointees;
(e) supervision and management of appointees;
(f) developing and maintaining the appointment relationship between Manulife and appointees and supporting the
development of Manulife and any member of Manulife Group;
(g) facilitating performance appraisals, progression, and appointment development activities;
(h) monitoring compliance with internal rules and guidelines issued by Manulife from time to time;
(i) review of appointment decisions;
(j) contacting appointees when absent from the office;
(k) assessing the training and development needs of appointees;
(l) administering retirement and/or provident fund schemes to which appointees contribute and/or from which they
may benefit;
(m) any residual appointment-related activities in relation to the former appointee including (but not limited to) provision
of references, processing applications for re-appointment and matters relating to retirement and/or provident fund
scheme payments; and allowing Manulife to fulfill contractual or statutory obligations;
(06/2024)
(n) confirming the identity of and uniquely identifying the applicant and/or appointee (as the case may be);
(o) confirming the accuracy of the information collected from the applicant and/or appointee (as the case may be);
(p) any purposes in connection with any claims made by or against or otherwise involving appointee in respect of his or
her appointment including (but not limited) to making, defending, analysing, investigating, processing, assessing,
determining, or responding to such claims;
(q) performing any functions and activities related to talent engagement including (but not limited to) research and
analysis;
(r) conducting matching procedures (as defined in the Ordinance, but broadly includes comparison of two or more
sets of the data subject’s data, for purposes of taking actions adverse to the interests of the data subject, such as
declining an application);
(s) making disclosure under and/or complying with the requirements of any law, rules, regulations, codes of practice,
guidelines or guidances binding on or applicable to Manulife or any member of Manulife Group (whether within or
outside Hong Kong) including (but not limited to) making disclosure to local or foreign regulators, governmental
bodies, court, law enforcements, or other authorities, industry recognised bodies, credit reference agencies, or
auditors (whether within or outside Hong Kong);
(t) complying with any contractual or other commitment or arrangement with local or foreign regulators, governmental
bodies, or industry recognised bodies, credit reference agencies or auditors (whether within or outside Hong Kong)
that is assumed by or imposed on Manulife or any member of Manulife Group by reason of its financial, commercial,
business or other interests or activities in or related to the jurisdiction of the relevant local or foreign regulators,
governmental bodies, industry recognised bodies, credit reference agencies or auditors;
(u) for operational purposes, credit assessment, credit scoring models or statistical analysis (including in each case,
behaviour analysis and evaluation on the overall relationship with Manulife Group which includes using such data
to comply with any obligations, requirements, policies, procedures, measures or arrangements for sharing data
and information within Manulife Group and/or other use of data and information in accordance with any Manulife
Group-wide programmes for compliance with sanctions or prevention or detection of money laundering, terrorist
financing or other unlawful activities), whether on the data subjects or otherwise;
(v) exercising any rights Manulife may have in connection with the appointment of appointees;
(w) conducting identity and/or credit checks;
(x) determining any amount of indebtedness owing to or from appointees, and collecting and recovering any amount
owing from appointees or any person who has provided any security or undertaking for the appointees’ liabilities;
(y) enabling an actual or proposed assignee, transferee, participant or sub-participant of the rights or business of
Manulife or any member of Manulife Group to evaluate the transaction intended to be the subject of the assignment,
transfer, participation, or sub-participation;
(z) purposes specifically provided for in any particular assignments to appointees;
(aa) any purposes relating to the above (including seeking professional advice) or any other purposes in accordance
with the general policies of Manulife or any member of Manulife Group in relation to talent management as set out
in notices, circulars, or other terms and conditions made available by Manulife or any member of Manulife Group to
appointees from time to time.
TRANSFEREES
5. Personal data of an applicant and/or appointee (as the case may be) held by Manulife will be kept confidential, but
Manulife may transfer such data to the following persons and/or entities (whether within or outside Hong Kong) for any
of the purposes set out in paragraph 4 above: -
(a) any person in connection with any claims made by or against or otherwise involving applicants and/or appointees
(as the case may be) in respect of any application or appointment;
(b) any agent, contractor or third-party service provider who provides administrative, telecommunications, computer,
information technology, payment, data processing or storage, marketing, mailing, printing, telemarketing, customer
satisfaction analysis, or other services to Manulife or any member of Manulife Group in connection with the operation
of business, including any custodian, administrator, investment manager, investment advisor or distributor;
(c) any credit reference agencies or, in the event of default, any debt collection agencies;
(d) any customers (including potential customers) of Manulife;
(e) any appointees (including his or her employees) of Manulife;
(f) insurers, reinsurers, and medical service providers;
(g) any employees of Manulife or of any member of Manulife Group;
(h) any person which has undertaken to Manulife or any member of Manulife Group to keep such data confidential;
(i) any actual or proposed assignee, transferee, participant or sub-participant of the rights or business of Manulife or
Manulife Group;
(j) any member of Manulife Group;
(06/2024)
(k) any person to whom Manulife or any member of Manulife Group is under an obligation or otherwise required to
make disclosure under the requirements of any law, rules, regulations, codes of practice, guidelines or guidances
binding on or applicable to Manulife or any member of Manulife Group including (but not limited to) any local or
foreign regulators, governmental bodies, court, law enforcements, or other authorities, industry recognised bodies,
credit reference agencies, or auditors;
(l) any person to whom Manulife or any member of Manulife Group is under an obligation or otherwise required to
make disclosure pursuant to any contractual or other commitment or arrangement with local or foreign regulators,
governmental bodies, industry recognised bodies, credit reference agencies or auditors (whether within or outside
Hong Kong) that is assumed by or imposed on Manulife or any member of Manulife Group by reason of its financial,
commercial, business, or other interests or activities in or related to the jurisdiction of the relevant local or foreign
regulators, governmental bodies, industry recognised bodies, credit reference agencies, or auditors.
6. Under the Ordinance, a data subject has the right to: -
(a) request access to his or her personal data;
(b) request correction of any of his or her personal data which is inaccurate;
(c) ascertain a data user’s policies and practices in relation to personal data;
(d) be informed of the kind of personal data held by the data user;
(e) be informed of the main purposes for which personal data held by the data user are or are to be used;
(f) make data access request and data correction request through the channel set out in paragraph 7 below.
7. In accordance with the provisions of the Ordinance, Manulife has the right to charge a reasonable fee for processing
any data access request. Requests may be made in writing to the Officer, Agency Compensation at: -
Manulife (International) Limited
22/F., Tower A, Manulife Financial Centre, 223-231 Wai Yip Street, Kwun Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong.
Manulife Investment Management (Hong Kong) Limited
23/F., Manulife Tower, One Bay East, 83 Hoi Bun Road, Kwun Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong.
8. Nothing herein shall create or be construed as creating an employment relationship (whether (i) express or implied; or
(ii) subsisting or present or future) between (a) Manulife and/or any member of the Manulife Group; and (b) an applicant
and/or appointee (as the case may be).
UPDATES AND CHANGES
9. Manulife reserves the right, at any time and without prior notice, to add, revise, update or modify this Statement,
by notifying applicants and/or appointees (as the case may be) of such addition, revision, update, or modification.
If Manulife decides to change this Statement (or its equivalent), Manulife shall notify applicants and/or appointees
through Manulife’s communications channel or in writing so that they are aware of the information that is collected,
how that information may be used, and under what circumstances that information is disclosed. Any such revision,
update or modification will be effective immediately upon notification or as otherwise specified by Manulife.
10. Important Note: For applicants and/or appointees (as the case may be) located within the borders of the People’s
Republic of China (excluding Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan for the purpose of this Statement), please be aware that
a specific “Privacy Addendum for Personal Information Protection Law (For Mainland Chinese)” (“Privacy Addendum”)
is applicable. This Privacy Addendum is available and can be accessed on Manulife’s website.
11. This Statement is provided in multiple languages to ensure all applicants and/or appointees are fully aware of Manulife’s
practices and standards regarding personal information handling. In the event of any discrepancies between the
translations, the English version will prevail.
(06/2024)

Personal Information Collection Statement 收集個人資料聲明
QBE Hongkong & Shanghai Insurance Limited (“the Company”) may use the personal data collected or held about you for the following purposes:
The Company may use the personal data the Company collects about you, which may include your name, address and other contact details, date of birth, bank account or credit card details, HK ID card
number, information about your dependents and health records, and which we may collect when, for example, you apply for, renew or make a claim under a policy and/or you correspond with us,
for the following purposes:
Insurance Services (mandatory)
1. processing and assessing of applications for any insurance products and daily operation of the related services;
2. administering your insurance policy and providing services in relation to your insurance policy;
3. any alterations, variations, cancellation or renewal of any insurance and related services;
4. investigating, analyzing, processing and paying claims made under your insurance policy;
5. invoicing and collecting premiums and outstanding amounts from you;
6. exercising any right under the insurance policy including right of subrogation, if applicable;
7. complying with the requirements under any law and regulation, industry codes, guidelines, requests from regulators, industry bodies, government agencies, law enforcement agencies and court orders;
8. to conduct research, insurance survey and analysis for the purpose of product design and development and improvement of our services to you;
9. for statistical or actuarial research undertaken by the Company, other members of the QBE Group or its regulators;
10. for the operation and administration of the Company's internal business including without limitation any corporate reorganisation;
11. contacting you for any of the above purposes; and
12. other ancillary purposes which are directly related to the above purposes.
The personal data you provide to the Company may be provided or transferred to the following persons in Hong Kong or overseas for the purposes set out in the above paragraph or directly related
purposes or as otherwise permitted by applicable law:
a. any agent, advisor, contractor or third party service provider (whether within or outside the QBE Group) who provides administrative, telecommunications, computer, payment, debt collection,
security, research, ratings, consulting services, product design, marketing (where you have consented to direct marketing as described below), data processing or storage or related services or
any other person carrying on insurance or reinsurance related business, or an intermediary, or a claim or investigation or other service provider providing services relevant to insurance business,
including Manulife (International) Limited;
b. any association, federation or similar organization of insurance companies ("Federation") that exists or is formed from time to time for any of the above or related purposes or to enable the
Federation to carry out its regulatory functions or such other functions that may be assigned to the Federation from time to time and are reasonably required in the interest of the insurance
industry or any member(s) of the Federation;
c. any members of the Federation by the Federation for any of the purposes referred to in (b) above or directly related purposes;
d. government bodies, regulators or any other body to whom the Company or any company within the QBE Group is required to or has agreed to make disclosure under any applicable laws or
regulations;
e. lawyers;
f. auditors; and
g. other insurance companies within the QBE Group which have undertaken to keep such information confidential.
Some of these persons may be located in countries overseas, namely Australia, where there may not be in place data protection laws which are substantially similar to, or serve the same purposes
as, the data protection laws of Hong Kong. That means your personal data may not be protected to the same or similar level as in Hong Kong. However, the Company will only transfer your personal
data to a service provider or overseas where the Company is satisfied that adequate levels of protection are in place to protect the integrity and security of any information being processed and
compliance with applicable privacy and data protection laws.
In the unlikely event that the Company, any companies within the QBE Group, or its or their brands or substantially all of any of its or their assets are acquired by an unrelated third party, your personal
data may be one of the transferred assets. By providing your personal data to the Company, you agree that the Company may disclose your personal data, on a confidential basis, to any prospective
transferee and its professional advisors for the purposes of their due diligence investigations, the completion of any such transaction and the continued operation of the acquired business.
You do not have to provide your personal data to the Company, but if you do not provide certain personal data (for example, the information indicated as mandatory on the relevant application,
registration or renewal forms, or your contact details if you send us an enquiry), it would not be possible for the Company to process your application and render the services or to otherwise
correspond with you.
The Company is committed to ensuring your personal data is kept secure and confidential and not kept for longer than is necessary.
Direct Marketing of Products and Services
To provide a more comprehensive range of financial and insurance services, the Company would like to use your name and the contact details you provide to us (for example, your mobile phone
number, residential phone number, office phone number, residential address, correspondence address and email address), alongside information that you provide about your age, gender and
occupation (the “Marketing Personal Data”), to provide you with direct marketing communications about the Company’s products and services including but not limited to the Company's insurance,
banking, financial services, provident schemes and general insurance products but the Company cannot do so without your consent.
The Company intends to share, from time to time and for money and other property, your Marketing Personal Data with Manulife (International) Limited, Manulife Asset Management (Hong Kong)
Limited, Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited and any investment fund sponsored or managed from time to time by a member within the group of Manulife Financial Corporation
(collectively “Manulife”) or QBE General Insurance (Hong Kong) Limited for the purpose of marketing to you their insurance, investment fund, provident schemes, and other financial products and
services including general insurance products and services, but we will not do so without your written consent.
If you do not want to receive any direct marketing, you may withdraw your consent at any time free of charge by contacting the Company’s Data Protection Officer below.
Your rights
You have the right to ascertain the Company's policies and practices in relation to personal data, and to obtain access to and to request correction of your personal data held by the Company. Your
right to access your personal data may be subject to payment of an administrative fee. Requests for such access or correction, to withdraw consent for direct marketing, or for further information
about our data privacy policies and practices, can be made in writing to the Data Protection Officer, QBE Hongkong & Shanghai Insurance Limited, 33/F, Oxford House, Taikoo Place, 979 King’s Road,
Quarry Bay, Hong Kong.
昆士蘭聯保保險有限公司(本公司)所收集閣下的個人資料,包括姓名、地址及其他聯繫方式、出生日期、銀行帳戶或信用卡資料、香港身份證號碼、有關閣的家屬資料和醫療記錄、以及本公司日後
可能會在閣下投保、續保、索賠或與我們通信時收集的資料，本公司可能用作下列的用途：
保險服務 (強制)
1. 處理及評估任何保險產品之申請，及有關服務之日常運作；
2. 管理閣下的保單及為閣下的保單提供相關服務；
3. 有關保險產品及服務的任何更改、變更、取消或續保；
4. 閣下保單索償的調查、分析、處理及賠償；
5. 保費通知、收集保費和款項；
6. 行使有關保險單賦予的任何權利包括代位權,如適用；
7. 遵守及符合任何法例及條例規定的要求、行業守則、指引，監管機構、相關行業認可機構、政府機構、執法機構及法庭頒令的要求；
8. 從事研究、保險調查及開發產品和設計之分析並改善本公司為閣下提供的服務；
9. 由本公司、本集團成員或其監管機構進行的統計或精算研究；
10. 本公司內部業務的運作和管理，包括但不限於公司重組；
11. 為上述任何用途與閣下聯絡；及
12. 與上述用途直接有關之其他附帶的目的。
閣下向本公司提供的個人資料可能會提供或轉送予下列在香港或海外的各方人士作前段所述的用途或直接相關的用途或其他適用法律許可的用途：
甲) 任何代理人、顧問、承辦商或提供行政、電訊、電腦、付賬、債務追討、保安、研究、評級、諮詢服務、產品設計、市場營銷(如閣下已如下所述同意直銷)、數據處理或儲存或有關服務的第三者
服務供應人(不論是否本集團的一部分)或任何其他從事與保險或再保險業務有關的人士，或中介人，或提供索償或調查或其他與保險業務有關的服務供應人，包括宏利人壽保險(國際)有限公司；
乙) 現存或不時成立的任何保險公司協會或聯會或類同組織(「聯會」)，以達到任何上述或有關的用途，或以便聯會執行其監管職能，或其他基於保險業或任何聯會會員的利益而不時在合理要求下
賦予聯會的職能；
丙) 透過聯會提供予任何聯會的會員，以達到任何上述(乙)中提到的或直接相關的用途；及
丁) 政府機構，監管機構或任何其他本公司或本集團內的任何公司根據任何適用的法律或法規必須或已經同意向其披露有關資料的機構；
戊) 執業律師；
己) 認可核數師；及
庚) 本集團內已承諾將資料保密的其他保險公司。
上列各方可能位於海，包括澳洲。這些海外國家保障個人資料的法律不一定與香港的有關法律相同，亦不一定能達到相同目的。即閣下的個人資料可能得不到相等於或相近於香港法律下的保障水平。
然而，本公司將閣下的個人資料轉送給服務供應商或轉送到海外前，本公司會確保接收資料的一方對有關資料有足夠的保護以保障資料的完整性和安全性，並遵守相關的私隱和個人資料保護法律。
一旦本公司、本集團內的任何公司、或本集團的品牌或實質上的全部資產被無關聯的第三方收購，閣下的個人資料可能會成為被轉讓的資產之一。當閣下向本公司提供個人資料的同時，亦表示閣下
同意本公司可能會，在保密的基礎上，向有關人士及其專業顧問提供閣下的個人資料，以作他們盡職調查的用途、或以完成有關交易及使被收購的企業可持續經營。
閣下有權拒絕向本公司提供個人資料。但如閣下不向本公司提供某些個人資料(如申請表格、註冊表格或續保表格上必須填寫的資料，或閣下查詢時沒有留下聯絡方法)，本公司便不能夠處理閣下的
申請、為閣下提供服務或與閣下聯絡。
本公司致力確保閣下個人資料安全和保密,資料的保留時間亦不會超過實際所需。
直接市場推廣產品及服務為提供更全面的金融和保險服務,本公司可能會使用閣下的姓名及閣下提供的聯
繫方式(如手提電話號碼、家居電話號碼、辦公室電話號碼、居住地址、郵寄地址及電子郵件地址)以及其他資料包括年齡、性別及職業(「市場推廣用途的個人資料」)作本公司產品及服務的直接
促銷，包括但不限於本公司的保險、銀行及金融服務、公積金計劃及一般保險產品。但本公司在未得到閣下的同意之前不能如此使用閣下的個人資料。本公司亦打算以金錢或其他得益作回報與
宏利人壽保險(國際)有限公司、宏利資產管理(香港)有限公司、宏利公積金信託有限公司及任何由宏利金融公司集團(下稱「宏利集團」)中的成員所保薦或管理的投資基金或昆士蘭保險有限公司
分享閣下市場推廣用途的個人資料，以用作向閣下推銷相關的保險、投資基金、公積金計劃及其他金融產品及服務包括一般保險產品及服務。但本公司在未得到閣下的書面同意之前不能如此
使用閣下的個人資料。
閣下如不欲收取任何直接市場推廣或銷售，閣下可以在任何時候聯絡本公司的資料保護主任免費撤回閣下的同意。
閣下的權利
閣下有權查明本公司就個人資料的政策和實務，並有權要求查閱及更正由本公司持有有關閣下的個人資料。查閱閣下的個人資料需支付行政費用。有關查閱或更正的要求，或有關撤回個人資料
用於直接市場推廣的同意，或如欲索取更多有關本公司的個人資料政策和實務，可致函香港鰂魚涌英皇道979號太古坊濠豐大廈33樓昆士蘭聯保保險有限公司，向資料保護主任提出。

Personal Information Collection Statement 收集個人資料聲明
QBE Hongkong & Shanghai Insurance Limited (“the Company”) may use the personal data collected or held about you for the following purposes:
The Company may use the personal data the Company collects about you, which may include your name, address and other contact details, date of birth, bank account or credit card details, HKID card
number, information about your dependents and health records, and which we may collect when, for example, you apply for, renew or make a claim under a policy and/or you correspond with us,
for the following purposes:
Insurance Services (mandatory)
1. processing and assessing of applications for any insurance products and daily operation of the related services;
2. administering your insurance policy and providing services in relation to your insurance policy;
3. any alterations, variations, cancellation or renewal of any insurance and related services;
4. investigating, analyzing, processing and paying claims made under your insurance policy;
5. invoicing and collecting premiums and outstanding amounts from you;
6. exercising any right under the insurance policy including right of subrogation, if applicable;
7. complying with the requirements under any law and regulation, industry codes, guidelines, requests from regulators, industry bodies, government agencies, law enforcement agencies and court orders;
8. to conduct research, insurance survey and analysis for the purpose of product design and development and improvement of our services to you;
9. for statistical or actuarial research undertaken by the Company, other members of the QBE Group or its regulators;
10. for the operation and administration of the Company's internal business including without limitation any corporate reorganisation;
11. contacting you for any of the above purposes; and
12. other ancillary purposes which are directly related to the above purposes.
The personal data you provide to the Company may be provided or transferred to the following persons in Hong Kong or overseas for the purposes set out in the above paragraph or directly related
purposes or as otherwise permitted by applicable law:
a. any agent, advisor, contractor or third party service provider (whether within or outside the QBE Group) who provides administrative, telecommunications, computer, payment, debt collection,
security, research, ratings, consulting services, product design, marketing (where you have consented to direct marketing as described below), data processing or storage or related services or
any other person carrying on insurance or reinsurance related business, or an intermediary, or a claim or investigation or other service provider providing services relevant to insurance business,
including Manulife (International) Limited;
b. any association, federation or similar organization of insurance companies ("Federation") that exists or is formed from time to time for any of the above or related purposes or to enable the
Federation to carry out its regulatory functions or such other functions that may be assigned to the Federation from time to time and are reasonably required in the interest of the insurance
industry or any member(s) of the Federation;
c. any members of the Federation by the Federation for any of the purposes referred to in (b) above or directly related purposes;
d. government bodies, regulators or any other body to whom the Company or any company within the QBE Group is required to or has agreed to make disclosure under any applicable laws or
regulations;
e. lawyers;
f. auditors; and
g. other insurance companies within the QBE Group which have undertaken to keep such information confidential.
Some of these persons may be located in countries overseas, namely Australia, where there may not be in place data protection laws which are substantially similar to, or serve the same purposes
as, the data protection laws of Hong Kong. That means your personal data may not be protected to the same or similar level as in Hong Kong. However, the Company will only transfer your personal
data to a service provider or overseas where the Company is satisfied that adequate levels of protection are in place to protect the integrity and security of any information being processed and
compliance with applicable privacy and data protection laws.
In the unlikely event that the Company, any companies within the QBE Group, or its or their brands or substantially all of any of its or their assets are acquired by an unrelated third party, your personal
data may be one of the transferred assets. By providing your personal data to the Company, you agree that the Company may disclose your personal data, on a confidential basis, to any prospective
transferee and its professional advisors for the purposes of their due diligence investigations, the completion of any such transaction and the continued operation of the acquired business.
You do not have to provide your personal data to the Company, but if you do not provide certain personal data (for example, the information indicated as mandatory on the relevant application,
registration or renewal forms, or your contact details if you send us an enquiry), it would not be possible for the Company to process your application and render the services or to otherwise
correspond with you.
The Company is committed to ensuring your personal data is kept secure and confidential and not kept for longer than is necessary.
Direct Marketing of Products and Services
To provide a more comprehensive range of financial and insurance services, the Company would like to use your name and the contact details you provide to us (for example, your mobile phone
number, residential phone number, office phone number, residential address, correspondence address and email address), alongside information that you provide about your age, gender and
occupation (the “Marketing Personal Data”), to provide you with direct marketing communications about the Company’s products and services including but not limited to the Company's insurance,
banking, financial services, provident schemes and general insurance products but the Company cannot do so without your consent.
The Company intends to share, from time to time and for money and other property, your Marketing Personal Data with Manulife (International) Limited, Manulife Asset Management (Hong Kong)
Limited, Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited and any investment fund sponsored or managed from time to time by a member within the group of Manulife Financial Corporation
(collectively “Manulife”) or QBE General Insurance (Hong Kong) Limited for the purpose of marketing to you their insurance, investment fund, provident schemes, and other financial products and
services including general insurance products and services, but we will not do so without your written consent.
If you do not want to receive any direct marketing, you may withdraw your consent at any time free of charge by contacting the Company’s Data Protection Officer below.
Your rights
You have the right to ascertain the Company's policies and practices in relation to personal data, and to obtain access to and to request correction of your personal data held by the Company. Your
right to access your personal data may be subject to payment of an administrative fee. Requests for such access or correction, to withdraw consent for direct marketing, or for further information
about our data privacy policies and practices, can be made in writing to the Data Protection Officer, QBE Hongkong & Shanghai Insurance Limited, 33/F, Oxford House, Taikoo Place, 979 King’s Road,
Quarry Bay, Hong Kong.
昆士蘭聯保保險有限公司(本公司)所收集閣下的個人資料，包括姓名、地址及其他聯繫方式、出生日期、銀行帳戶或信用卡資料、香港身份證號碼、有關閣下的家屬資料和醫療記錄、以及本公司
日後可能會在閣下投保、續保、索賠或與我們通信時收集的資料，本公司可能用作下列的用途：
保險服務 (強制)
1. 處理及評估任何保險產品之申請，及有關服務之日常運作；
2. 管理閣下的保單及為閣下的保單提供相關服務；
3. 有關保險產品及服務的任何更改、變更、取消或續保；
4. 閣下保單索償的調查、分析、處理及賠償；
5. 保費通知、收集保費和款項；
6. 行使有關保險單賦予的任何權利包括代位權,如適用；
7. 遵守及符合任何法例及條例規定的要求、行業守則、指引，監管機構、相關行業認可機構、政府機構、執法機構及法庭頒令的要求；
8. 從事研究、保險調查及開發產品和設計之分析並改善本公司為閣下提供的服務；
9. 由本公司、本集團成員或其監管機構進行的統計或精算研究；
10. 本公司內部業務的運作和管理，包括但不限於公司重組；
11. 為上述任何用途與閣下聯絡；及
12. 與上述用途直接有關之其他附帶的目的。
閣下向本公司提供的個人資料可能會提供或轉送予下列在香港或海外的各方人士作前段所述的用途或直接相關的用途或其他適用法律許可的用途：
甲) 任何代理人、顧問、承辦商或提供行政、電訊、電腦、付賬、債務追討、保安、研究、評級、諮詢服務、產品設計、市場營銷(如閣下已如下所述同意直銷)、數據處理或儲存或有關服務的第三者
服務供應人(不論是否本集團的一部分)或任何其他從事與保險或再保險業務有關的人士，或中介人，或提供索償或調查或其他與保險業務有關的服務供應人，包括宏利人壽保險(國際)有限公司；
乙) 現存或不時成立的任何保險公司協會或聯會或類同組織(「聯會」)，以達到任何上述或有關的用途，或以便聯會執行其監管職能，或其他基於保險業或任何聯會會員的利益而不時在合理要求下
賦予聯會的職能；
丙) 透過聯會提供予任何聯會的會員，以達到任何上述(乙)中提到的或直接相關的用途；及
丁) 政府機構，監管機構或任何其他本公司或本集團內的任何公司根據任何適用的法律或法規必須或已經同意向其披露有關資料的機構；
戊) 執業律師；
己) 認可核數師；及
庚) 本集團內已承諾將資料保密的其他保險公司。
上列各方可能位於海外，包括澳洲。這些海外國家保障個人資料的法律不一定與香港的有關法律相同，亦不一定能達到相同目的。即閣下的個人資料可能得不到相等於或相近於香港法律下的保障水平。
然而，本公司將閣下的個人資料轉送給服務供應商或轉送到海外前，本公司會確保接收資料的一方對有關資料有足夠的保護以保障資料的完整性和安全性，並遵守相關的私隱和個人資料保護法律。
一旦本公司、本集團內的任何公司、或本集團的品牌或實質上的全部資產被無關聯的第三方收購，閣下的個人資料可能會成為被轉讓的資產之一。當閣下向本公司提供個人資料的同時，亦表示閣下
同意本公司可能會，在保密的基礎上，向有關人士及其專業顧問提供閣下的個人資料，以作他們盡職調查的用途、或以完成有關交易及使被收購的企業可持續經營。
閣下有權拒絕向本公司提供個人資料。但如閣下不向本公司提供某些個人資料(如申請表格、註冊表格或續保表格上必須填寫的資料，或閣下查詢時沒有留下聯絡方法)，本公司便不能夠處理閣下的
申請、為閣下提供服務或與閣下聯絡。
本公司致力確保閣下個人資料安全和保密，資料的保留時間亦不會超過實際所需。
直接市場推廣產品及服務
為提供更全面的金融和保險服務，本公司可能會使用閣下的姓名及閣下提供的聯繫方式(如手提電話號碼、家居電話號碼、辦公室電話號碼、居住地址、郵寄地址及電子郵件地址)以及其他資料
包括年齡、性別及職業(「市場推廣用途的個人資料」)作本公司產品及服務的直接促銷，包括但不限於本公司的保險、銀行及金融服務、公積金計劃及一般保險產品。但本公司在未得到閣下的
同意之前不能如此使用閣下的個人資料。本公司亦打算以金錢或其他得益作回報與宏利人壽保險(國際)有限公司、宏利資產管理(香港)有限公司、宏利公積金信託有限公司及任何由宏利金融
公司集團(下稱「宏利集團」)中的成員所保薦或管理的投資基金或昆士蘭保險有限公司分享閣下市場推廣用途的個人資料，以用作向閣下推銷相關的保險、投資基金、公積金計劃及其他金融
產品及服務包括一般保險產品及服務。但本公司在未得到閣下的書面同意之前不能如此使用閣下的個人資料。
閣下如不欲收取任何直接市場推廣或銷售，閣下可以在任何時候聯絡本公司的資料保護主任免費撤回閣下的同意。
閣下的權利
閣下有權查明本公司就個人資料的政策和實務，並有權要求查閱及更正由本公司持有有關閣下的個人資料。查閱閣下的個人資料需支付行政費用。有關查閱或更正的要求，或有關撤回個人資料
用於直接市場推廣的同意，或如欲索取更多有關本公司的個人資料政策和實務，可致函香港鰂魚涌英皇道979號太古坊濠豐大廈33樓昆士蘭聯保保險有限公司，向資料保護主任提出。

Sub-Scheme No. (if any) 附屬計劃編號（如有）：
I/We hereby register with Manulife for the use of the MPF e-services of the ec-Work Mobile App. I/We will
be submitting our employees’ enrolment information including enrolment forms through the ec-Work
Mobile App. I/We agree to be bound by the terms (including the declaration given by me/us) of the
enrolment forms as if the enrolment forms are duly signed by the employer’s authorized signatory and
affixed with our company chop. I/We therefore instruct Manulife to accept such enrolment forms.
本人／吾等謹此向宏利登記使用易做好手機應用程式之強積金電子化服務。本人／吾等將透過易做
好手機應用程式遞交僱員的參加資料包括參加表格。本人／吾等同意受參加表格上的條款（包括本
人／吾等作出的聲明）約束，如同參加表格已獲僱主授權人士簽署妥當並蓋上公司印章，因此本人
／吾等指示宏利接受該等參加表格。

Name and Title (in Block Letters) Date
姓名及職銜（正楷） 日期
Note: The use of the MPF e-Services requires the support from Manulife to make necessary arrangement to accept the
enrolment information/forms submitted electronically and Manulife may, at its discretion, suspend or
discontinue such support at any time. In this circumstance, the employer/company should submit the enrolment
information/forms using other means/channels provided by Manulife.
注意：使用強積金電子化服務需要宏利的支援，作出必需的安排以接受經由電子途徑遞交的參加資料／表格，
而宏利可隨時按其酌情權暫停或終止該支援。在此情況下，僱主／公司應採用宏利提供的其他方式／
途徑遞交參加資料／表格。

個人保險代理、持牌保險業務代表（代理人）或持牌保險業務代表（經紀）（統稱為“個人持牌人”）
的相關事宜提供指引。
一般事宜
 相關申請表格須以中文或英文填寫，但英文／中文姓名（名稱）除外。
 在將與申請有關的所有證明文件遞交予保監局前，你的委任主事人須妥為核對相關正本。
 若你為已持有牌照的保險中介人，並有意申請另一種類型的保險中介人牌照，於遞交新申
text:
申請保險中介人牌照須知
個人保險代理／業務代表（代理人）／業務代表（經紀）
本須知旨在就根據《保險業條例》（“《條例》”）向保險業監管局（“保監局”）遞交申請成為持牌
個人保險代理、持牌保險業務代表（代理人）或持牌保險業務代表（經紀）（統稱為“個人持牌人”）
的相關事宜提供指引。
一般事宜
 相關申請表格須以中文或英文填寫，但英文／中文姓名（名稱）除外。
 在將與申請有關的所有證明文件遞交予保監局前，你的委任主事人須妥為核對相關正本。
 若你為已持有牌照的保險中介人，並有意申請另一種類型的保險中介人牌照，於遞交新申請前，請確
保該持有的牌照已獲註銷。
 請確保申請表格內填寫的電郵地址屬準確。保監局將使用電郵與你聯絡。
 請注意，於申請中提供虛假或具誤導性的資料，屬刑事罪行。
保險中介人資格考試（“資格考試”）
 有關豁免及免除應考資格考試安排的詳情，請參閱“《條例》（第41章）有關持牌保險中介人‘適當
人選’的準則指引 (指引23)”（有關“適當人選”的準則指引）附件1（保險中介人資格考試）。
 若你考試成績達到70%或以上，則被視為已通過資格考試試卷。
 若你已連續兩年停止在香港保險業從事與保險有關的工作，或若你在通過資格考試後連續兩年未在香
港保險業從事與保險有關的工作，你過往的資格考試成績將不獲認可。
 若你有意申請從事相連長期業務受規管活動，除非你獲豁免或免除，否則你須通過提升版的投資相連
長期保險試卷。
 若你通過遙距監考模式考試(＂遙距考試＂)的相關試卷，會被視為已通過對應的資格考試試卷，因此
你在符合其他所有適用的發牌規定的前提下，將可獲發出中介人牌照，以進行通過該等試卷所允許的
相關業務類別的受規管活動。然而，於通過遙距考試的日期起計 18 個月內 （＂18 個月期限＂），你
必須：
(i) 完成由職訓局營運管理的有關資格考試試卷的特設培訓課程；或
(ii) 參加原有資格考試的相關試卷並考獲及格成績。
換言之，你會獲發之首個牌照會在上述的 18 個月期限屆滿後失效。首個牌照的 18 個月有效期，會
以最新的遙距考試試卷通過日期起開始計算。於 18 個月期限屆滿時，只要你於 18 個月期限內完成
上述 第(i) 或 第(ii)項 的要求，並於申請中介人牌照續期時向保監局出示有關證明，你的牌照便可獲續
期 3年。但是，若你於首個牌照屆滿時，未能向保監局提交其於 18 個月限期內已完成上述試後方案
第(i) 或第 (ii) 項的證明，其首個牌照將於 18 個月期限屆滿時失效，並不獲續期。有關詳情，請參閱
保監局於2020年12月21日及2022年3月15日發出的通函。
1
學歷／專業資格
 有關最低學歷要求的規定，應參閱有關“適當人選”的準則指引。若你具備香港中學文憑考試五科成
績達第2級或以上（包括一科語文科目（中國語文／英國語文）及數學）的資格，你可將其用於支持
你的申請。
 有關獲認可的保險資格的詳情，請參閱保監局網站刊載的列表。
 由根據香港法例成立或註冊可頒授學位的高等教育院校所頒發的保險、法律、商業、風險管理、會計、
金融、醫學科學、工程或某個相關學科的文憑，通常視為可予接受。
 根據《非本地高等及專業教育（規管）條例》（第 493 章）註冊或獲豁免的課程頒發的文憑將按個別
情況進行評核。另外或需提供相關資格／課程的額外資料。
 有關最低學歷要求規定的豁免標準的詳情，請參閱有關“適當人選”的準則指引附件2（豁免）。
 若你曾在保險代理登記委員會、香港保險顧問聯會或香港專業保險經紀協會（統稱為“自律規管機
構”）使用內地資格作首次登記，你須遞交先前就有關登記而向自律規管機構遞交的學歷證明文件副
本，以及有關證書真偽的官方經核證文件的副本，例如全國高等學校學生信息諮詢與就業指導中心
（學信網）發出的確認書、公證書或相關機構的直接確認書。另外，若你在首次向自律規管機構登記
前已獲得其他資格，你可將有關資格用於支持你的申請。
受僱情況
 在填寫有關受僱情況的部分時，請注意以下事項：
- 若你現時受僱於一名以上僱主，請提供有關你的現時受僱情況的所有資料。
- 若你現時並無受僱，請提供有關你最近受僱的資料。
- 若你為應屆畢業生，請註明“不適用”。
證明文件

非香港永久性居民 香港身份證

工作簽證

（如遺失證書／成績單，請聯絡職業訓練局尋求協助。）
文憑試／會考／國際預科文憑／毅進文憑／指定保險資歷 證書／文憑
（如遺失證書／考試成績，請聯絡有關簽發機構尋求協助。） （合併考試成績為可接受。）
內地及國際公開考試 畢業證書
（或須提供經核證文件，例如全國高等學校學生信息諮詢與就 考試成績（例如高考及普通教育文
業指導中心（學信網）發出的確認書、公證書或相關機構的直 憑）
接確認書。）
學位／文憑 證書／文憑
（或須提供其他文件，例如成績單、課程大綱／資料及出席記 香港學術及職業資歷評審局（評審
錄。） 局）評核結果
金融監管機構授予的牌照 相關牌照補充表格
有關品格、財務狀況、紀律處分及調查（見第VI節）的任何 請另頁提供相關資料，並一併提供相
問題，可回答“是” 關證明文件。
刑事罪名／破產／紀律處分補充表格
2
其他事項
 請在表格中註明委任主事人的註冊名稱。
 請確保你已提供支持本申請所需的所有資料及文件。申請表格中的所有問題均須回答。若表格（或補
充表格）不完整或沒有提供所需的證明文件，保監局可能會將你的申請表格退回你的委任主事人（若
多於一名主事人，則退回委任主事人1）。
 你須將書面申請親身遞交予保監局市場行為部（發牌），或以郵遞方式寄送至保監局辦事處，地址為
香港黃竹坑香葉道41號19樓。
 自保險中介人新監管制度於2019年9月23日實施起計的首五年，牌照申請費用可獲豁免。
 你將可獲申請結果的書面通知。有關你的申請事宜，請聯絡你的委任主事人。有關牌照申請的查詢，
須聯絡保監局市場行為部（發牌）。
 保監局會優先處理透過保監局網上平台 (即“保險中介一站通＂) 所遞交的電子申請表格。對於簡單或
並不複雜的申請，視乎所遞交文件的質量，保監局可在5個工作日內處理透過保險中介一站通遞交的
有關申請；而透過文本形式遞交的申請表格處理時間為3個星期或以上。
 若你有意撤回你的申請，請向保監局作出書面通知。
最近更新：2022年3月

text:
Application Supplement
投保申請附加資料
CRITICAL ILLNESS LIVING BENEFIT
一世無憂危疾附加保障
EXERCISE OF COVER-ME-AGAIN OPTION
行使備用保障權益
PLAN NAME OF THE NEW COVERAGE NAME OF INSURED
新保障計劃名稱 受保人姓名
POLICY NO. OF THE ORIGINAL COVERAGE EFFECTIVE DATE OF THE ORIGINAL COVERAGE
原有保障保單編號 原有保障生效日
CUSTOMER’S DECLARATION
客戶聲明
Every reference in this declaration to:
於本聲明內提及的:
• “Original Coverage” means the coverage offering the Cover-Me-Again option that is being exercised.
「原有保障」指提供有關之備用保障權益之保障。
• “New Coverage” means the coverage issued under the exercise of the Cover-Me-Again option.
「新保障」指根據行使有關之備用保障權益所發出之保障。
I, being the policyowner of the New Coverage, hereby declare that I understand and agree to the following:
本人﹝新保障之保單持有人﹞謹此聲明本人明白及同意下列條款：
PARTICULARS
詳情
In consideration for the exercise of Cover-Me-Again option, the Provision of the New Coverage shall be issued with the following amendments:
當行使有關之備用保障權益時，新保障的條款將加入以下修訂：
• No Living Benefits will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness or Gender Specific Illness which existed or the cause
or signs or symptoms of which existed before the date of endorsement or the effective date of the New Coverage, whichever is later.
本公司不會就新保障的批註日或新保障的生效日前（以較後者為準）已經存在的任何危疾或男性及女性疾病，或引致有關危疾
或男性及女性疾病的已存在成因、症狀或病徵支付在生利益賠償。
• No Living Benefits will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness or Gender Specific Illness claimed under the Original
Coverage and related illnesses determined by the Company.
本公司不會就任何曾於原有保障提出索償的危疾或男性及女性疾病及本公司釐定的相關疾病支付在生利益賠償。
• The life insured must survive a period of 28 days or the period stipulated in the Provision of the New Coverage, whichever is longer,
following the diagnosis of Critical Illness or Gender Specific Illness covered under the New Coverage before any benefit with respect to
which is payable.
受保人在被診斷證實患上新保障包括的危疾或男性及女性疾病之日起計的首28天或新保障條款指定的期限（以較長者為準），
必須仍然在世，本公司方會支付有關賠償。
• The claim amount payable for Living Benefits under the New Coverage will be reduced by 50% if the diagnosis of that Critical Illness or
Gender Specific Illness is within the first 12 months from the date of endorsement or the effective date of the New Coverage, whichever is
later. After the Company pays the Critical Illness Benefit on any Critical Illness other than “Angioplasty and Other Invasive Treatments for
Coronary Artery Disease”, the New Coverage shall, without prejudice to any other termination or settlement provision, terminate with no
further benefit payable by the Company.
如受保人在新保障的批註日或新保障的生效日後（以較後者為準）的首12個月內被診斷證實患上危疾，本公司將賠償該項危疾
或男性及女性疾病的在生利益賠償額50%。在本公司給予「血管成形術及其他冠狀動脈之創傷性治療」以外之任何危疾賠償後，在
不影響任何其他保單終止或收款規定的原則下，新保障將會自動終止，而本公司亦不會再作出任何賠償。

Application Supplement
投保申請附加資料
• If the policyowner or life insured is excluded or restricted in any manner under the Original Coverage from claiming for or receiving any
benefit or any part thereof due to or in any event related to any illness/ sickness/ injury/ disability/ medical treatment and/ or any
complications or diseases related thereto in respect of the life insured, all these illness/ sickness/ injury/ disability/ medical treatment and/
or any complications or diseases related thereto shall in respect of the life insured remain excluded or restricted from any coverage/ benefit
under the New Coverage.
倘若保單持有人或受保人因任何病患／疾病／傷病／傷殘／治療及／或因此而導致的任何併發症或疾病而遭拒絕或限制接受原
有保障的任何保障或賠償，新保障將仍然拒絕或限制為此等所有與受保人有關之病患／疾病／傷病／傷殘／治療及／或因此而
導致的任何併發症或疾病提供保障／賠償。
• The section “Cover-me-Again Option” is removed from the Provision of the New Coverage.
新保障的條款已刪去「備用保障權益」一節。

• No Living Benefits will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness, Juvenile Disease, Angioplasty Procedure or Gender
Specific Illness which existed or the cause or signs or symptoms of which existed before the issue date or the policy year date of the New
Coverage, whichever is later.

• No Living Benefits will be payable under the New Coverage for any Critical Illness, Juvenile Disease, Angioplasty Procedure or Gender

本公司不會就任何曾於原有保障提出索償的危疾、兒童疾病、血管成形術及相關治療，或男性及女性疾病及本公司釐定的相關

months from the issue date or the policy year date of the New Coverage, whichever is later. After the Company pays the Death Benefit, the

Company.

Manulife (International) Limited is requested to make the following additions, corrections and amendments in the application in
relation to the above policy number signed by me.
宏利人壽保險( 國際 )有限公司將按指示對本人就有關上述保單編號已簽署之申請書作出下列資料增補，更正及修改事宜。
It is agreed that they are to be of the same effect as it contained in the application.
所有資料均如申請書內之資料同樣有效。
(a) COLLECTION OF LEVY ON INSURANCE PREMIUM(S) BY THE INSURANCE AUTHORITY (“IA”) 保險業監管局(「保監局
」)所收取的保費徵費
I/We, the policyowner, hereby acknowledge, agree and confirm the following in relation to my obligations to pay a prescribed
levy on each premium payment made under the policy (“Levy”) pursuant to section 134 of the Insurance Ordinance (Cap. 41),
the Insurance (Levy) Regulation and the Insurance (Levy) Order:
本人/吾等(作為保單持有人)知悉、同意及確認，根據《保險業條例》(第 41 章)第 134條、《保險業(徵費) 規例》及《保險業(徵
費)令》，有關本人/吾等有責任於每次根據保單繳付保費時需同時繳付訂明徵費 (「徵費」) 的以下各項：
1. The policyowner shall, each time a premium is paid, pay Levy to the IA, via the Company, the amount of which is subject to
the rate and cap as prescribed by the Insurance (Levy) Order.
保單持有人需要於每次繳付保費時，透過本公司繳付徵費予保監局，其金額乃根據《保險業(徵費)令》所訂明的徵費率及徵費
上限而計算。
2. A failure to pay Levy by the policyowner when a premium is paid is a contravention of the Insurance (Levy) Regulation. The
IA may recover the outstanding Levy as a civil debt due to the IA and impose a pecuniary penalty at a rate as from time to
time prescribed under the Insurance (Levy) Regulation against the policyowner.
如保單持有人沒有於繳交保費時繳付徵費，保單持有人將會被視作違反《保險業(徵費)規例》。保監局有權以民事債項為基礎
追收未繳付的徵費，以及根據由《保險業(徵費) 規例》不時訂明的費率，對保單持有人施加罰款。
3. In the event of default for payment of Levy, the Company may, at its discretion and/or as reasonably required by the IA,
provide the particulars of the policyowner to the IA.
對於拖欠繳付徵費的情況，本公司可酌情決定及/或根據保監局合理的要求，提供保單持有人的詳情予保監局。
4. The Company shall collect Levy from the policyowner along with the payment of the corresponding premium. Unless
specified otherwise, where the premium is settled according to the terms of the policy and/or the instruction of the
policyowner through, including without limitation, direct debit from an account specified by the policyowner, deduction from
premium dump-in facility, accumulated dividends and/or other entitlements available to the policyowner, automatic premium
loan and/or other automatic premium payment options, the Levy corresponding to the premium so collected shall be
collected at the same time and in the same manner.
本公司將於保單持有人繳付保費時一併收取相應徵費。除非另有註明，否則，當保費以根據保單條款及/或保單持有人所指示
的方式繳付時，包括但不限於從保單持有人指定的直接付款帳戶扣繳、從保單注入款項、累計紅利及/或保單持有人的其他適
用權益扣除、以自動貸款代繳保費及/或其他自動繳交保費方式，則本公司將於同一時間及以相同方式收取該筆保費的相應徵
費。
5. Any outstanding of Levy shall be treated as an indebtedness to the Company and the Company may first deduct the amount
of outstanding Levy as indebtedness from the benefits and/or entitlements (including without limitation the cash value,
dividend and/or death proceeds of the policy) otherwise available to the policyowner, assignee or beneficiary, if any,
pursuant to the policy, as the case may be.
任何欠繳的徵費會被本公司視為負債。當本公司提供保障及/或權益予保單持有人、受讓人或受益人時，包括但不限於保單的
現金價值、紅利及/或死亡賠償(如適用及根據保單及情況而定)，可先從金額中扣除被視為負債的欠繳徵費。
6. The premium and levy can be paid in other currency as acceptable by the Company, by using the prevailing exchange rate
as determined by the Company which may change from time to time. Under such circumstances, the policyowner may be
subject to exchange rate fluctuation risk.
保費及徵費可以本公司所容許的其他貨幣支付，惟需根據當時適用的兌換率計算，而兌換率是由本公司釐定並可不時作出修訂。
在這情況下，保單持有人可能需承受匯率風險。
7. The above confirmation shall bind my/our successors, assignees and/or beneficiaries. This confirmation shall remain valid
notwithstanding my/our death or incapacity.
本人/吾等之繼承人、受讓人及/或受益人亦受此確認書約束。即使本人/吾等死亡或失行為能力，此確認書仍然存有法律效力。

詳情
(1) EFFECTIVE DATE OF BENEFITS
保障的生效日期
The effective date of the additional coverage and/or benefit due to the benefit upgrade for Hospital Benefits will commence:
(1) except for Accidental Injury, thirty (30) days after the date of endorsement or thirty (30) days after the effective date of change of the
benefit upgrade, whichever is later;

(1) 批註日期三十（30）日後或更改提高保障的生效日期三十（30）日後正式生效（以較後者為準），意外受傷則除外;
(2) 意外受傷的額外保障，將會於批註日期或更改提高保障的生效日期正式生效（以較後者為準）。
(2) PRE-EXISTING CONDITION
已存在的情況
Notwithstanding anything in this Policy, the additional coverage and/or benefit due to the benefit upgrade for Hospital Benefits shall not be
payable for any illnesses or injuries which were originated before the date of endorsement or the effective date of change of the benefit upgrade,
whichever is later.

Save as expressly revised above, all other provisions of the Policy shall remain in full force and effect.

客戶聲明
I, the Policyowner of the policy, hereby declare that I understand and agree to the following changes to the Policy:
本人 [ 此保單之保單持有人] 謹此聲明本人明白及同意下列對此保單之改動：
PARTICULARS
詳情
Notwithstanding any provisions to the contrary in this Policy or the Basic Plan, with effect from the Change Effective Date, this Policy shall be
amended as follows:-
不論本保單或基本計劃內有任何相反條款，本保單將由更改生效日期起作出以下修訂：
(1) The Basic Plan shall be terminated with no further liability on the part of the Company and no further benefits shall be payable under the Basic Plan.
基本計劃終止，而本公司於基本計劃下再無任何責任，亦毋須再支付任何賠償。
(2) The Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) shall remain in force, but no reinstatement thereof shall be allowed.
延續之附加保障維持生效，但不可就其申請復效。
(3) All Supplementary Benefits other than the Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) attached to this Policy shall be terminated.
除延續之附加保障以外，本保單所有附加保障全部終止。
(4) Where any of the Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) is expressed by its provision to be terminated when the Basic Plan is terminated, such
Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) shall remain in force notwithstanding such contrary provision. However, the Continued Supplementary
Benefit(s) shall in no circumstances remain in force beyond the date which otherwise would have been the maturity of the Basic Plan.
即使任何此等延續之附加保障於其條款中訂明會在基本計劃終止時同時終止，該延續之附加保障仍會維持生效，不論有任何具相反意
義之條款 。然而，不論任何情況下，延續之附加保障於基本計劃的原訂到期日以後不再生效。
(5) Where any of the Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) is expressed by its provision to be terminated when the Basic Plan is fully paid up, such
Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) shall remain in force notwithstanding such contrary provision.
即使任何此等延續之附加保障於其條款中訂明會在基本計劃繳清時終止，該延續之附加保障仍會維持生效，不論有任何具相反意義之
條款 。
(6) No further supplementary benefits shall be allowed.
不可再附加其他附加保障。
(7) All Inflation Protector Option (attached to the Basic Plan and/or the Continued Supplementary Benefit(s), if any) shall be terminated.
所有通脹加保權益（附帶於基本計劃及／或延續之附加保障，如有）全部終止 。
(8) No increase in the Protection Amount or benefit amount of any of the Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) shall be allowed.
不可提高任何延續之附加保障之保障金額或賠償金額 。
(9) No plan upgrade or benefit upgrade under the Continued Supplementary Benefit(s) shall be allowed.
不可提高任何延續之附加保障之計劃級別或保障 。

(10) The General Provisions of this Policy shall be deleted in its entirety and replaced by the Company’s standard provisions including the following
本保單之一般條款將會全部被删除，並由本公司之標準條款（包括以下條款）所取代：
PAYMENT OF PREMIUMS
繳付保費
Premiums are payable during the life insured’s lifetime in accordance with the premium schedule on the latest policy change endorsement. Any
date in the premium schedule which was based on the assumption that the life insured would be a specified age on such date will be corrected,
if necessary, to agree with the life insured’s true age.
保費支付人須於受保人在世期間，按照最新更改保單資料批註上的保費表繳付保費。如有需要，任何列於「保費表」上，假定受保人
將達某特定年齡之日期，將被修訂至與受保人之真實年齡相符。
Premium due date will be the first date of the payment cycle corresponding to the payment mode selected by the Policyowner. Failure to pay a
premium on or before its due date to the Company in accordance with the Company’s then payment handling procedures will constitute default
in payment of that premium.
保費到期日爲按投保人選擇之繳款方式所訂繳款週期的首日。若未能於每個到期日或之前，按本公司之繳款處理手續繳交保費予本公
司，便作不清償保費論。
A grace period of 31 days from its due date will be allowed for payment of a premium in default, during which time this policy will continue to
be in force. If a premium remains unpaid after expiration of the grace period, then, without the necessity of sending or giving to the Owner any
notarial or other notice, insurance under the policy will cease to be in force.
保費若於到期日仍未繳清，將有三十一天寬限期，期間保單仍然有效。若保費在寛限期後仍未繳交，則此保單將告失效，而本公司毋
須向保單持有人發出通知書。
Notwithstanding any other provision, premium in default will be deducted from any benefit payable under this policy.
不論有否其他條款，拖欠的保費將從應支付利益中扣除。
SUICIDE
自殺
If the life insured commits suicide, whether sane or insane, before the date 1 year after this policy’s date of issue, the Company’s liability under the
policy will be limited to the amount paid to the Company less any amount paid by the Company, the amounts being those paid under this policy.
於本保單簽發日起計一年內，若受保人自殺身亡，不論事發時精神是否健全，本公司之責任只限於將已繳交之保費，在扣除本公司對
本保單之支出後退還。
If the life insured commits suicide, whether sane or insane, before the date 1 year after the date of any reinstatement, the Company’s liability
under the policy will be limited to the liability had there been no reinstatement, increased by the amount paid to the Company after
reinstatement, excluding the repayment of default premium to the Company, and decreased by any amount paid by the Company, the amounts
being those paid under this policy.
以本保單復效日起計一年內，若受保人自殺身亡，不論事發時精神是否健全，本公司之責任只限於保單復效前之責任，如同保單從未
復效，以及退還在保單復效後繳交之保費 ( 不包括不清償保費 ) 扣除本公司對本保單之支出後之餘額。

( For Special Voluntary Contributions Account "SVC" : Flexi Retirement Contribution / Tax Deductible
Voluntary Contributions Account "TVC" 特別自願性供款帳戶 : 自選退休供款╱可扣稅自願性供款帳戶適用)
Important Notes 重要事項:
1. eMPF Platform Company Limited ( "eMPF Company" ), a wholly owned subsidiary of the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Authority General Terms
( "MPFA" ), will provide the scheme administration services to you through the eMPF Platform, subject to the "General Terms and and Conditions of
Conditions of the eMPF Platform" which can be accessed from https://empf.org.hk/tnc/en. This form is applicable only if you have the eMPF Platform
積金易平台
previously given your signature specimen to the eMPF Platform / the Trustee. If not, please submit your request via eMPF Member
一般條款及細則
Portal or visit eMPF Service Centre to provide your signature specimen for verification. 積金易平台有限公司 (「積金易公司」) 是強制性
公積金計劃管理局 (「積金局」) 的全資附屬公司。積金易公司將根據「積金易平台一般條款及細則」( 可於 https://empf.org.hk/tnc 瀏覽 )，
透過積金易平台為你提供計劃行政服務。本表格只適用於如你已經提供簽署樣式予積金易平台╱受託人。如你尚未提供有關紀錄，請透過
積金易成員平台遞交指示或前往積金易服務中心以提供你的簽署樣式以作核對用途。
2. Please read the MPF Scheme Brochure and the Key Scheme Information Document ( "KSID" ) of the Scheme and the Important Notes
carefully before completing this form. 填寫本表格前，請先參閱本計劃之強積金計劃說明書、主要計劃資料文件及重要事項。
3. The information provided in this form will supersede any previous information which has been submitted to the eMPF Platform / the Trustee ( if applicable ).
The existing information will remain unchanged if no update for relevant part(s) in this form. 本表格所列之資料將取代所有之前已遞交予積金易平台╱受託人的
資料( 如適用 )。如本表格相關部份沒有更新，現有資料將維持不變。
4. Please complete this form in BLOCK LETTERS with black or blue pen and tick the appropriate box(es). Please countersign beside any amendment.請用黑色
或藍色筆以正楷填寫本表格，並在適當空格內填上剔號。如有刪改，請於更改位置旁加簽。
5. The signature ( including countersign ) in this form should match with the signature specimen of the eMPF Platform / the Trustee ( please refer to point 1 of
the Important Notes ). 本表格的簽署( 包括加簽 )必須與積金易平台╱受託人的簽署樣式相符(請參閱重要事項第一點)。
6. The eMPF Platform will process this request upon receipt of this completed form and all relevant supporting document(s) ( if any ). If there are any omissions
( including but not limited to missing page(s) / supporting document(s) ), the eMPF Platform may not be able to process this request. 積金易平台收到完整表格
及相關證明文件 ( 如有 )後，才會處理有關指示。如有遺漏 ( 包括但不限於頁數╱證明文件不齊全 )，積金易平台可能未能執行此指示。
7. Please submit a separate form for each of the accounts ( if applicable ). 請就每個帳戶分別填寫一份表格 ( 如適用 )。
8. The information provided in this form will be used in accordance with the relevant MPF legislation and for the purposes mentioned in the "Personal Information
Collection Statement" ( "PICS" ) of the eMPF Platform and the Scheme. For details, please refer to the PICS provided overleaf. 本表格所有已提供的資料將按
照有關強積金法例、積金易平台及本計劃《收集個人資料聲明》(「聲明」)處理。詳情請參閱後頁所提供的「聲明」。
A. MEMBER PARTICULARS 成員資料
(1) Scheme Details 計劃資料
(i) Name of Trustee受託人名稱 Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited 宏利公積金信託有限公司 ( "the Trustee" 「受託人」)
(ii) Scheme Name 計劃名稱 Manulife Global Select (MPF) Scheme 宏利環球精選（強積金）計劃 ( "the Scheme" 「本計劃」)
(2) Member Name 成員名稱 ( As shown on HKID Card / Passport 與香港身份證╱護照上的姓名相同 )
( "the Member" 「成員」)
(3) Member Account No. 成員帳戶號碼
(4) Identification 身分證明
HKID Card 香港身份證 Passport 護照 ( Applicable ONLY for an individual without HKID Card 僅供沒有香港身份證人士填寫 )
Document No. 證件號碼
1 of 6 GS-CC-25V1
1
B. CONTRIBUTION INSTRUCTION 1 & 2 供款指示 1 及 2
Please choose appropriate option(s) and provide the relevant information ( if applicable ). 請揀選適當選項及提供相關資料( 如適用 )。
(1) Regular Contribution 定期供款
Regular Contribution Change Effective Date 3 0 1 DD / MM / YYYY
更改定期供款生效日期 3 日╱月╱年
Monthly Regular Contribution Amount 4 HKD 元
每月定期供款金額 4 港幣
• The minimum monthly contribution amount for SVC is HKD500. 按月特別自願性供款的最低供款金額為港幣500元。
• The minimum monthly contribution amount for TVC is HKD300. 按月可扣稅自願性供款的最低供款金額為港幣300元。
HKD
(2) Lump Sum Contribution Amount 4 整筆供款金額 4 港幣 元
• The minimum first lump sum contribution amount for SVC is HKD10,000; the minimum subsequent lump sum contribution amount is HKD5,000 首次整
筆特別自願性供款的最低供款金額為港幣10,000元；其後整筆供款的最低供款金額為港幣5,000元。
• The minimum lump sum contribution amount for TVC is HKD3,000. 整筆可扣稅自願性供款的最低供款金額為港幣3,000元。
1 For TVC account holder, the maximum amount of deductions allowable in a year of assessment under salaries tax and tax under personal assessment of the Inland Revenue Ordinance
is HKD60,000 and it is an aggregate limit for both TVC and qualifying deferred annuity policy premiums. 就可扣稅自願性供款帳戶持有人，根據《稅務條例》，薪俸稅及個人入息課稅的最
高可扣稅金額為港幣60,000元。該筆金額為可扣稅自願性供款及其他合資格延期年金保費的總限額。
2 There are two options for making contributions. You can make regular contribution and / or lump sum contribution. Please note that if you choose to make lump sum contribution in
addition to regular contribution, or vice versa, the two instructions will not override each other. If you wish to stop making regular contribution, please complete Part E of this form. 供款有
兩種付款模式。你可揀選定期供款及╱或整筆供款。請注意，如你選擇定期供款後再作出整筆供款，或選擇整筆供款後，再作出定期供款，兩項指示將不會互相取代。如你擬停止作出定
期供款，請填寫本表格E部分。
3 If no effective date is indicated or the indicated effective date is earlier than the processing date of the eMPF Platform, the eMPF Platform will follow up your request. 如沒有填寫生效日期
或填寫的生效日期早於積金易平台的執行日，積金易平台將會跟進你的指示。
4 Please indicate a payment method in Part D below. 請於下列D 部分填寫付款方法。
2 of 6 GS-CC-25V1
1
A AA:: C. SOURCE OF FUNDS 資金來源
Please choose one of the options below only and provide supporting document(s) for the proof of source of fund ( if applicable ). Additional documents may be
requested on a case-by-case basis by the eMPF Platform. 請只揀選下列其中一項及提供資金來源證明文件 ( 如適用 )。積金易平台會根據具體情況要求提供額外文件。
(1) Salary 薪金 (5) Sale of property 出售物業
• Monthly salary 月薪 • Address of property 物業地址
(2) Personal savings 個人儲蓄
• Name of bank 銀行名稱
• Sales proceeds 出售收益
• Total amount 總金額
• Date of sale 出售日期
(3) Investment holdings 持有投資
• Description of investment 投資說明 (6) Maturing investments or insurance policy 投資或保單到期
• Description of investment 投資說明
• Value of investment 投資價值
• Proceeds received from the investments or policy
從投資或保單所得的款項
(4) Inheritance 遺產
• Details of the inheritance 遺產詳情
• Date of maturity 到期日
• Date received the inheritance繼承遺產日期
(7) Others 其他
• Nature of the income / wealth 收入╱財富的性質
• Inheritance amount 遺產金額
• Received amount 所收金額
• Date of receipt 收款日期
3 of 6 GS-CC-25V1
1
A AA:: D. PAYMENT METHOD AND DETAILS 付款方法及詳情
Please choose appropriate option(s) and provide payment information ( if applicable ). If no option is chosen, payment method will be defaulted as by "Direct
Debit" if you have set up direct debit. Otherwise, it will be defaulted by "Cheque" without prior notice. 請揀選適當選項及提供付款資料( 如適用 )。如沒有就付款方
法作出選擇，而你已設立直接扣帳，付款方法將預設為「直接扣帳」。否則，將預設為「支票」及不作另行通知。
(1) Direct Debit 直接扣帳
(i) Set Up / Change Direct Debit 設立╱更改直接扣帳
• Please download "Direct Debit Authorization" ( "DDA Form" ) via visiting the website of the eMPF Platform ( https://empf.org.hk/forms/en ) or Form Centre
scanning the QR code and complete "DDA Form" if you wish to set up / change direct debit. It takes approximately 3 to 6 weeks from the receipt 表格中心
date of your completed "DDA Form". The eMPF Platform will send you a confirmation notifying you the success of direct debit setup / change.
Please settle contribution by other payment means before direct debit setup / change is completed. 如你擬設立╱更改直接扣帳，請透過瀏覽積金易
平台的網頁 ( https://empf.org.hk/forms ) 或掃描二維碼下載及填寫「直接付款授權」(「直接付款授權表格」)。設立╱更改直接扣帳由收到完整「直
接付款授權表格」起計，約需時三至六個星期。積金易平台將會發出確認書，通知你有關直接扣帳申請成功設立╱更改。於直接扣帳辦妥前，請透過
其他付款途徑付款。
• Please fill in monthly direct debit day in Part D(1)(ii) below for direct debit setup. 就設立直接扣帳，請於下列D(1)(ii) 部分填寫每月直接扣帳日。
• As the setup / change of direct debit takes time, you may make the contribution by other payment method until the direct debit has been set up and
provide payment information below ( if applicable ). 由於設立╱更改直接扣帳需時，你可以其他付款方法繳付供款直至直接扣帳成功設立及提供下列付款
資料( 如適用 )。
(ii) Regular Contribution by Direct Debit 以直接扣帳作定期供款
DD
Monthly Direct Debit Day 每月直接扣帳日 日
• Please fill in monthly direct debit day if you wish to apply direct debit or change the monthly direct debit day for regular contribution. 如你擬就定期供款使用直接扣帳或更改
每月直接扣帳日，請填上每月直接扣帳日。
• The eMPF Platform will arrange direct debit on the monthly direct debit day indicated above. If no monthly direct debit day is indicated for regular contribution, it will
be defaulted to 10th of the month. If the selected direct debit day falls on a Saturday, a public holiday, a gale warning day or black rainstorm warning day, it will be the
following working day. 積金易平台將會在上述每月直接扣帳日安排直接扣帳。如沒有就定期供款填寫每月直接扣帳日，此將預設為每月的10日。如揀選的直接扣帳日為星
期六、公眾假日、烈風或黑色暴雨警告日，則順延至隨後的工作天。
• Please note that the monthly direct debit date may vary due to the transactional arrangement of the relevant bank. 請注意每月直接扣帳日期或會因有關銀行的交易安排而
有所不同。
• If you have set up direct debit with upper limit for each payment, please review the direct debit upper limit and update it via completing "DDA Form" ( if applicable ). 如你已
就每筆直接扣帳設置付款上限，請查閱直接扣帳上限及填寫「直接付款授權表格」以更新資料( 如適用 )。
(iii) Lump Sum Contribution by Direct Debit 以直接扣帳作整筆供款
• If you have set up direct debit, please maintain sufficient funds in the bank account for the lump sum payment before returning this form to the eMPF Platform. The eMPF
Platform will debit the lump sum contribution from your existing bank account after processing this form. 如你已設立直接扣帳，遞交本表格予積金易平台前，請確保銀行戶
口內備有足夠款項作整筆供款。積金易平台將在處理此表格後，從你現有的銀行戶口中扣除整筆供款。
(2) Cheque支票
(i) Payment Means 付款途徑
a. Cheque 支票
• Please enclose a crossed cheque in your name and made payable to "Manulife Provident Funds Trust Company Limited". 請附上由你簽發的劃線支票，抬頭
祈付「宏利公積金信託有限公司」。
• Post-dated cheques are not accepted. 恕不接受期票。
• Please note that MPF intermediaries are not authorized to receive MPF cheques on behalf of the eMPF Platform. You are particularly reminded to arrange
submission to the eMPF Platform directly. 請注意強積金中介人並非收取強積金供款支票的正式途徑，你應直接遞交供款及有關文件予積金易平台。
• Payment can be made via HSBC cheque deposit machines ( "CQM" ). Please select "03" for the CQM bill type and input your 16-digit "MPF Contribution Bill
No." or 16-digit eMPF "Submission Reference No.". ( Not applicable to SVC ) 供款支票可透過滙豐銀行存支票機存入。請在存支票機上選擇帳單類別「03」，並
輸入你的16位數字「強積金供款帳單號碼」或16位數字積金易「提交參考編號」。( 不適用於特別自願性供款 )
(ii) Payment Details 付款詳情
a. Cheque No. b. Payment AmountHKD
支票號碼 付款金額 港幣 元
(3) Electronic Means 電子途徑 ( Not applicable to SVC 不適用於特別自願性供款 )
(i) Payment Means 付款途徑
a. PPS 繳費靈
• Please make payment and input the merchant code of the Scheme ( i.e. 9351 ) via visiting website at www.ppshk.com / using "PPS on Mobile" app ( as applicable );
or 請透過瀏覽網址 www.ppshk.com ╱使用「繳費靈手機服務」應用程式 ( 適用者為準 ) 繳付款項並輸入計劃的商戶編號 ( 即9351 )；或
• Please make payment and input the merchant code of the Scheme ( i.e. 9351 ) via calling 18031. 請透過致電18033 繳付款項並輸入計劃的商戶編號 ( 即9351 )。
(ii) Payment Details 付款詳情
a. Transaction Reference No. b. Payment AmountHKD
交易參考編號 付款金額 港幣 元
• Please fill in transaction reference no. and provide relevant supporting document / payment slip together with this form ( if applicable ). Otherwise, the eMPF
Platform may require additional processing time for payment processing. 請填寫交易參考編號及連同此表格一併提供相關證明文件╱付款收據 ( 如適用 )。否則，積
金易平台可能需要額外時間處理款項。
4 of 6 GS-CC-25V1
1
E.CESSATION OF REGULAR CONTRIBUTION 停止定期供款
DD / MM / YYYY
Effective Date 生效日期 0 1 日╱月╱年
•If no date is specified or the indicated effective date is earlier than the processing date, the effective date will be taken as the 1st calendar day of the following month after
the eMPF Platform processing the request. 若沒有列明生效日期或所指示之日期早於本表格的執行日期，生效日期將以積金易平台執行日翌月的第一個曆日作準。
•If you have set up direct debit authorization, please contact your bank to cancel the authorization, otherwise the eMPF Platform may continue to debit your
existing direct debit account for contributions. 如你已設立直接付款授權，請聯絡你的銀行取消授權，否則積金易平台可能會繼續從你現有的直接付款戶口中扣除
供款。
F. AUTHORIZATION AND DECLARATION 授權及聲明
By signing this form, the Member ( "I" ) 在簽署本表格，成員( 下稱「本人」)：
1. I have read and understood the General Terms and Conditions of the eMPF Platform, the Important Notes in this form, the MPF Scheme Brochure and the
KSID of the Scheme, and agree to abide by the rules stated therein. 本人已閱讀及明白積金易平台一般條款及細則、本表格的重要事項、本計劃之強積金計劃
說明書及主要計劃資料文件，並同意遵守當中所述規則。
2. I understand and agree to the terms of the PICS of the eMPF Platform and the Scheme. 本人明白及同意積金易平台及本計劃「聲明」條款。
3. I declare and confirm that the request and the information given by me in this form is correct and instruct the eMPF Platform / the Trustee to process this
request accordingly. And I understand that the failure to provide any information requested on this form may result in the inability to process my request. 本人
聲明並確認本表格的指示及資料乃正確，並指示積金易平台╱受託人執行本指示。並且，本人明白如未能提供本表格所要求的任何資料，可導致不能處理本人
的指示。
4. I understand that details as specified in Part B(1) of this form will override any arrangement on regular contribution ( if applicable ). 本人明白於本表格B(1) 部
分所填寫的資料將取代定期供款的所有安排 ( 如適用 )。
5. I understand that the Trustee reserves the right not to accept any additional regular contribution / lump sum contribution as specified in Part B of this form at
any time. 本人明白受託人保留權利隨時不接受任何於本表格B 部分所填寫的新增定期供款╱整筆供款。
6. In the absence of wilful default, gross negligence or fraud, I agree to indemnify and keep the eMPF Platform / the Trustee indemnified against any and all
losses, costs, expenses, actions, proceedings suffered by the eMPF Platform / the Trustee related to my contribution change. 在沒有故意失責、嚴重疏忽或欺
